description.default: A points reward management plugin for habit tracking. Add points, create wishes, track progress with calendar and charts.
description.en_US: A points reward management plugin for habit tracking. Add points, create wishes, track progress with calendar and charts.
description.zh_CN: 凡人修仙传主题打卡插件。每日添加灵石记录修行，创建心愿单激励自己，通过日历和图表追踪修仙进度，助你养成良好习惯，证得大道。
